short_summary: Iran deal shifts US focus away
rationale: Trump's claimed Iran settlement and diplomatic pivot reinforce concern that US attention and resources may shift away from Ukraine, sustaining aid uncertainty without a concrete cut being announced.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran 'great settlement', cancels strikes
top_events.summary: US diplomatic energy focused on Iran deal raises continued risk that Ukraine aid and attention will be deprioritized by Washington.

top_events.title: Vance says Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
top_events.summary: US-Israel friction signals an assertive US diplomatic posture; context for how Washington may also pressure Ukraine in negotiations.

top_events.title: El Niño confirmed active, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Could affect Ukrainian agricultural output and energy demand, adding economic pressure during wartime.
